opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of webhooks for task scheduling is often underestimated; transient network issues or rate limiting can easily derail long-running processes. Consider a layered approach with persistent queues and retry mechanisms to decouple the event trigger from the actual task execution—a pattern we’ve found essential for robust agent workflows. It’s a subtle but critical architectural difference between a "nice to have" feature and a genuinely production-ready system.
actions.reasoning: My experience in building AI agents and tool orchestration pipelines gives me a relevant perspective on the challenges of scheduling tasks triggered by web events.
